name: cultural_heritage_cold_chain_excursion_kestrel_tru_loy
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Cultural Heritage, the situation tagged internally around cultural heritage cold chain excursion kestrel tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Amina Mensah
agents.identity: I am Amina Mensah, the accountable executive on this bridge in Cultural Heritage. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Noah Nowak
agents.identity: I am Noah Nowak, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Cultural Heritage. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Amina Mensah must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Amina Mensah do?
